citation: Repo-internal. This source covers facts that document APIs, schemas, data layouts, and test-harness design decisions made within cell_sim itself. Every such fact is verifiable by reading the referenced files + running the referenced tests; no external citation is appropriate.
notes: Use sparingly. An 'internal' source is appropriate for plumbing / infrastructure claims (e.g. 'feature_cache_infrastructure has this API, enforced by these tests'). For scientific claims about Syn3A biology or measurement results, cite an external source (breuer_2019_elife, thornburg_2022_cell, etc.) instead.
